requirement_topic.en: Noise Handling Without an Outdoor-Noise Product Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 无户外噪声产品标识下的噪声处理
requirement_topic.zht: 無戶外噪聲產品標識下的噪聲處理

summary.en: Mozambique does not operate an EU-style outdoor-noise product marking regime （there is no equivalent of the EU guaranteed-sound-power marking for listed outdoor equipment）. Noise is instead addressed honestly as a general product-safety, user-information, and occupational topic: declared noise data and operator hearing guidance may be expected in Portuguese documentation, and any noise limits would arise from the occupational framework rather than a standalone product mark.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克并未实行欧盟式户外噪声产品标识制度（不存在针对列名户外设备的欧盟保证声功率标识等价物）。噪声因此被如实作为一般产品安全、用户信息和职业议题处理：葡萄牙语文件中可能需要声明的噪声数据和操作者听力指引，任何噪声限值来自职业框架而非独立产品标识。
summary.zht: 莫三比克並未實行歐盟式戶外噪聲產品標識制度（不存在針對列名戶外設備的歐盟保證聲功率標識等價物）。噪聲因此被如實作為一般產品安全、用戶資訊和職業議題處理：葡萄牙語文件中可能需要聲明的噪聲數據和操作者聽力指引，任何噪聲限值來自職業框架而非獨立產品標識。

standards_or_laws: Mozambique occupational health and safety framework （workplace noise exposure）
Adopted NM/IEC 62841 noise-declaration test clauses where cited [voluntary technical route]
Portuguese-language user information and hearing-protection guidance

summary.en: China GB/T 3883 safety evidence usually focuses on electrical and mechanical hazards and may include noise-declaration data per the IEC 62841 noise clauses, but it carries no EU-style guaranteed sound-power marking or outdoor-equipment category classification, which Mozambique also does not require as a product mark.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 3883 安全证据通常侧重电气和机械危险，可能依据 IEC 62841 噪声条款包含噪声声明数据，但不含欧盟式保证声功率标识或户外设备类别划分，而莫桑比克同样不要求此类产品标识。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 3883 安全證據通常側重電氣和機械危險，可能依據 IEC 62841 噪聲條款包含噪聲聲明數據，但不含歐盟式保證聲功率標識或戶外設備類別劃分，而莫三比克同樣不要求此類產品標識。

standards_or_laws: China occupational noise standards where applicable

gap.en: The honest position is that there is no Mozambique outdoor-noise product-marking gap to close, because no such mark exists. The realistic gap is documentation: declared noise/vibration data and operator hearing-protection information should appear in the Portuguese user manual, and employers importing the tools should consider workplace noise-exposure duties under the occupational framework.
gap.zh: 如实而言，不存在需要弥合的莫桑比克户外噪声产品标识差距，因为该标识并不存在。现实差距在于文件：声明的噪声/振动数据和操作者听力保护信息应出现在葡萄牙语用户手册中，进口工具的雇主应考虑职业框架下的工作场所噪声暴露义务。
gap.zht: 如實而言，不存在需要彌合的莫三比克戶外噪聲產品標識差距，因為該標識並不存在。現實差距在於文件：聲明的噪聲/振動數據和操作者聽力保護資訊應出現在葡萄牙語用戶手冊中，進口工具的雇主應考慮職業框架下的工作場所噪聲暴露義務。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory outdoor-noise product mark exists in Mozambique; noise is handled through general product-safety documentation and the occupational health-and-safety framework for workplace exposure.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 3883 may include IEC 62841 noise-declaration data, but this is technical documentation, not a mandatory standalone noise mark.

source.publisher: INNOQ - Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade （Mozambique）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No outdoor-noise product-mark non-compliance applies because Mozambique has no such regime. Treat noise honestly as a documentation and occupational-exposure matter: provide declared noise/vibration data and hearing-protection guidance in Portuguese rather than chasing a nonexistent product mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不适用户外噪声产品标识的不合规，因为莫桑比克没有此类制度。应如实将噪声作为文件和职业暴露事项处理：在葡萄牙语文件中提供声明的噪声/振动数据和听力保护指引，而非追求并不存在的产品标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不適用戶外噪聲產品標識的不合規，因為莫三比克沒有此類制度。應如實將噪聲作為文件和職業暴露事項處理：在葡萄牙語文件中提供聲明的噪聲/振動數據和聽力保護指引，而非追求並不存在的產品標識。
